title: Displaced Lebanese families rush home as fragile ceasefire takes force
summary_full: Even amid uncertainty over whether the truce would hold, many in Lebanon expressed relief at the prospect of quiet as aid groups mobilized help.
summary_public: Even amid uncertainty over whether the truce would hold, many in Lebanon expressed relief at the prospect of quiet as aid groups mobilized help.

LB.label: positive
